task_completion.description: Locate and select the inspection camera in the robot hierarchy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots Scene Tree panel, the 'CRAWLER_ROBOT' node should be expanded, and the 'inspection_camera' node should be visible and selected.

task_completion.description: Configure the camera's resolution and base field of view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots Scene Tree or Field Editor for 'inspection_camera', the 'width' field must be set to 1920, the 'height' field to 1080, and the 'fieldOfView' field to 1.57.

task_completion.description: Add and configure the Focus node for the camera.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'inspection_camera' node, the 'focus' field must contain a 'Focus' node. When expanded, its 'focalLength' must be 0.05, 'minFocalDistance' must be 0.1, and 'maxFocalDistance' must be 10.0.

task_completion.description: Add and configure the Zoom node for the camera.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'inspection_camera' node, the 'zoom' field must contain a 'Zoom' node. When expanded, its 'maxFieldOfView' must be 1.57 and 'minFieldOfView' must be 0.157.

task_completion.description: Save the modified world to the specified Desktop path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save World As...' dialog box showing the path '/home/ga/Desktop/ptz_inspection_camera.wbt', or the main Webots window title bar updated to show 'ptz_inspection_camera.wbt'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Webots GUI to make the configurations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Webots application interface being actively used to edit fields, rather than terminal commands or scripts performing the edits.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the simulator GUI by editing the world file in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent opening the .wbt file in text editors like nano, vim, gedit, or VS Code to manually type in the node configurations.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the Scene Tree to add nodes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should capture the agent clicking through the Scene Tree, using the 'Add Node' dialogs for Focus and Zoom, and typing values into the Field Editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target output path: /home/ga/Desktop/ptz_inspection_camera.wbt. Target robot: CRAWLER_ROBOT. Target camera: inspection_camera. Required camera properties: width=1920, height=1080, fieldOfView=1.57. Required Focus node properties: focalLength=0.05, minFocalDistance=0.1, maxFocalDistance=10.0. Required Zoom node properties: maxFieldOfView=1.57, minFieldOfView=0.157.
